learnings: NO side: 21/36 won, net $-23.14 this window.
YES side: 0/1 won, net $-2.00 this window.
Profile split: live 11/12 won ($+21.94); research 10/25 won ($-47.07). Judge each gate set on its own book; research-profile losses are expected data-collection cost.

Clean next-day forecast error averaged 2.50F across 6 settled day(s) in this window.
recommended_changes: Window ROI is materially negative on a fair sample; audit the largest losers for a shared failure mode before the next change.
Mean absolute forecast error is 2.50F; review source weights and recent Google/NWS disagreement before trusting tail bins.

profitability_gate.reason: No dataset source gets live trading weight until it has an after-cost market backtest with at least 30 matched trades.

dataset_research.promotion_rule: Collect broadly, but do not give a new source live model weight or loosen paper-trading gates until it improves held-out forecast error and then survives an after-cost market backtest with enough trades.
